body.title: Add Friday /audit-expert trigger to day-close
body.result: Added Friday eval-run + weekly-retro + audit-expert trigger to day-close; first-Monday monthly panel
body.description:
The expert audit has no scheduled cadence — it only runs when manually invoked. Day-close on Fridays is the natural trigger for the weekly 3-expert panel.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/day-close/SKILL.md (add Friday conditional step after day-close-audit)
**Design rules:** Friday detection via date +%u (1=Mon, 5=Fri); audit-expert runs in weekly mode (3 random experts) unless manually overridden to monthly
**Scope boundary:** in scope: add to day-close checklist — 'Step N: If Friday (date +%u == 5): run /audit-expert'. Add note that monthly full panel runs on first Monday of month. Out of scope: auto-selecting experts, changing audit-expert itself.
**Test plan:** skill file change; verify conditional logic is unambiguous; manual test on a Friday.
